headline: Bell Celebrates Launch of Operations for Bell 429 Helicopters in Queensland Police Commissioning Ceremony
summary: RotorTech - Brisbane, Australia - Bell Textron Inc., a Textron Inc. company, today celebrates the commissioning of three Bell 429 helicopters by the Queensland Police Service for use in North...
